--- Lesley Groff lesley@nysgllc.com wrote:

Want to make sure you saw this!

-----Original Message-----
From: John Brockman [mailto:brockman@edge.org]
Sent: Friday, May 18, 2007 10:42 AM
To: Jeffrey Epstein
Cc: Karla Taylor; Lesley Groff
Subject: Hotel Reservation for Kahneman event

Jeffrey (Leslie),

Did you made your room reservation at Auberge du
Soleil for the Kahneman
weekend?

IF NOT, PLEASE DO IT TODAY as the hotel is holding
back some rooms for
us.

If you have made your reservation, PLEASE LET ME
KNOW. A couple of
people have registered under pseudonyms and the
hotel, due to their
privacy rules, will not tell us who they are.

Auberge du Soleil has a range of rooms and suites
available at different
prices. To book your room, please call Kara Adamson,
Director of Sales
and Marketing (and not reservations), whose contact
information is
below. Fyi, hotel check-in on Friday is at 3 p.m.,
Friday, July 20th.
Check-out is at 12 p.m., Sunday July 22nd.

Please let me know. Any questions, call my assistant
Karla Taylor at
212-935-8900 x19.

Best regards,

JB
